title: carpinus japonica
intro: Carpinus japonica, also known as the Japanese hornbeam or ironwood, is a deciduous tree native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpinus japonica include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
